name: io.lucidnest/mcp
description: LucidNest MCP server — ADHD-friendly task, notes & project management. 18 tools: todos (create/list/complete/delete), notes (create/search/delete), notebooks, projects, quotes, My Day planning. Scoped API tokens per user.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer token created at https://lucidnest.io/settings/mcp-tokens (scoped: notes/todos/projects/notebooks/quotes × read/write/delete).
